task_completion.description: Verify taxpayer profile is created with correct name and province.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 personal information or wizard screen showing the name 'Julianne Dubois' and province of residence as 'British Columbia' or 'BC'.

task_completion.description: Verify T4 employment income and union dues are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: T4 slip entry screen showing $65,000 in Box 14 (Employment income) and an entry for union dues (Box 44).

task_completion.description: Verify T4A art project grant and exemption are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: T4A slip entry screen showing $5,000 for an art project grant (typically Box 105) and a $500 CRA grant exemption applied.
Medical expenses worksheet or entry screen showing a total or individual entry of $1,800.

task_completion.description: Verify T777 employment expenses for musical instruments and employed artists are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form T777 (Statement of Employment Expenses) showing musical instrument maintenance ($1,200), musical instrument insurance ($800), and employed artists' expenses for makeup/promotional ($1,500).

task_completion.description: Verify Class 8 Capital Cost Allowance for the cello is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Capital Cost Allowance (CCA) table on Form T777 showing Class 8, an opening Undepreciated Capital Cost (UCC) of $14,000, and an addition during the year of $3,000.

task_completion.description: Verify the tax return is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax application title bar showing 'julianne_dubois.24t' or a 'Save As' dialog confirming the file is being saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\julianne_dubois.24t'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual StudioTax 2024 application windows being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying a .24t file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the tax forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the tax forms (T4, T4A, T777) populated with the specific numbers from the prompt, rather than just an empty file being saved with the target name.

integrity.description: Verify the output file is a genuine StudioTax file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen using a terminal (e.g., 'touch' or 'echo') to create a dummy file named 'julianne_dubois.24t' in the target directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Julianne Dubois. Province: BC. Output File Path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\julianne_dubois.24t. T4 Income: $65,000. T4A Grant: $5,000 with $500 exemption. Medical Expenses: $1,800. T777 Expenses: Maintenance $1,200, Insurance $800, Makeup/promotional $1,500. CCA Class 8: Opening UCC $14,000, Addition $3,000.
